title: マイルCS南部杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I've been thinking. Running in both the
turf and dirt Mile Championships is the perfect
move for a true all-rounder!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, here we are in Morioka for the Mile
Championship Nambu Hai.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Gwehehe! My, oh mile, it's the Mile
Championship Nambu Hai!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm ready! I've toughened this bod to handle
anything Mother Nature's got to throw at me, be
it squall or gale!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You know it! It took a lot of time and hard work,
but I've finally mastered this region's accent!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll be blend'n right in with the local folks all easy
peasy lem'n squeezy, just you watch!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Fwehehahaha! I'm feel'n so peachy! The peachiest!
Ah! There y're, Digital! I found you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! I'd recognize that darling voice anywhere...
A voice as soft and fluffy as the tail of its owner,
completely befitting her peaceful demeanor. It
can be none other than the Morioka's own
Yukino!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. You're spot on! I'm here visit'n home, so I
just had to swing by and cheer for you!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I brought some classic Moriokan snacks too. You
can have 'em before the race or whenev'r you
happen t'get hungry.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Did you hear that, Trainer?! Yukino took precious time out of her precious trip to come support me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And she brought me a gift! Look! Nambu is famous for these crispy, savory rice crackers!
choice_data_list: Now you have to show her your top game!
Now you have to show her your top game!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Yes sir! A good fan never lets her oshi down!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Yes ma'am! A good fan never lets her oshi down!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I want to make Yukino proud, and I also want to
fully savor the natural charms of the Tohoku
runners. Which means...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna blast through at full throttle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Brimming with excitement after receiving Yukino
Bijin's priceless support, Agnes Digital heads to
the waiting room.
